def classify_region(country_code):
    if country_code in {"US", "CA", "MX"}:
        return "north_america"
    elif country_code in {"GB", "FR", "DE", "IT", "ES"}:
        return "europe"
    elif country_code in {"JP", "CN", "KR"}:
        return "asia"
    return "other"

def is_valid_status(status):
    return status in {"active", "pending", "suspended"}

def get_priority_color(priority):
    if priority in {"critical", "high"}:
        return "red"
    elif priority in {"medium"}:
        return "yellow"
    elif priority in {"low", "none"}:
        return "green"
    return "gray"

def format_currency(amount, currency):
    if currency in {"USD", "CAD", "AUD"}:
        return f"${amount:.2f}"
    elif currency in {"EUR", "GBP"}:
        return f"€{amount:.2f}"
    return f"{amount:.2f} {currency}"
